case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS GEORGE VALERIA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGE VALERIA GEORGE DONALD $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
